title: Build/install loop for system-wide kbs and kbsc during dogfood test
description: Keep host binaries current while testing: run repeatable cargo install --path rust --force cadence and record versions used for each validation run.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Starting system-wide binary install loop for kbs/kbsc before integration mutations.
Evidence: task state open -> in_progress.
Next: cargo install --path rust --force and record runtime versions.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Completed first forced system-wide install pass for dogfood run.
Evidence: cargo install --path rust --force replaced /opt/homebrew/bin/kbs and /opt/homebrew/bin/kbsc; kbs version reports kanbus-py-0.16.0-76-gf115036.
Next: repeat install pass after Docker mutation test loop before final summary.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Completed second forced install pass to keep host binaries current for final validation.
Evidence: cargo install --path rust --force reran successfully; active binaries verified from ~/.cargo/bin.
Next: close install-loop task and proceed with runbook deliverable.
Risk/Blocker: none.
